APPROVE
Stage 1 test-config constructor is implemented per spec: `TestLoopConfigOpts` and `NewTestConfigForLoop` live in `cli/internal/config/testconfig.go`, exported and documented; the test goes opts → *Config → Resolve → ResolvedConfig and verifies each accessor round-trips. artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T150015-aff595ab/reviewer-stream.log

success
Stage 1 test-config constructor is implemented per spec: `TestLoopConfigOpts` and `NewTestConfigForLoop` live in `cli/internal/config/testconfig.go`, exported and documented; the test goes opts → *Config → Resolve → ResolvedConfig and verifies each accessor round-trips. The diff also wires `NoProgressCooldown`/`MaxNoChangesBeforeClose`/`HeartbeatInterval` into `(*Config).Resolve` so the round-trip actually works — a necessary correlate noted in SD-024 Stage 1. The auxiliary `TestLoopOverrides` helper is a reasonable accommodation for fields with no durable *Config home (Assignee/Profile/MinTier/MaxTier) and does not violate the "no shortcut to construct ResolvedConfig directly" rule.
